channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: PWA Beats Native
item.description: PWAs often beat native apps in cost, speed, and reach. Learn how Service Workers and the Web App Manifest deliver superior user experience and business value.

item.title: Blockchain Beyond Hype
item.description: Cut through blockchain hype. Real-world insights on Hyperledger Fabric & Corda for supply chain, identity, finance. Performance, pitfalls, and when NOT to use DLTs.

item.title: Message Queues: Kafka vs RabbitMQ vs SQS: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: A practical guide to Message Queues: Kafka vs RabbitMQ vs SQS covering implementation, real performance benchmarks, common mistakes, and honest tradeoffs.

item.title: AI in Learning
item.description: AI in education: 25% increase in math scores, 30% in reading

item.title: AI Beyond Text
item.description: Multi-modal AI models process images, audio, and text

item.title: Remote Work Wins
item.description: Remote work vs office: what the data shows

item.title: Deploy Web Apps for Less
item.description: Deploy web apps for less with serverless architecture and containerization

item.title: Docker in Prod: Hidden Truths
item.description: Docker in production

item.title: Web3 Dev Uncovered
item.description: Web3 dev insights and trade-offs

item.title: Code Review Done Right
item.description: Improve code quality with effective review

item.title: Open Source Profits
item.description: Open source profits through right business models

item.title: Digital Transformation Gone Wrong
item.description: Digital transformation failures: 70% of projects fail

item.title: Build WhatsApp Like Chat
item.description: WhatsApp handles 100B messages daily with <100ms latency. Learn the reconnection fabric, MQTT QoS, and battery optimizations that most chat tutorials miss.

item.title: AI Cash Boost
item.description: AI cash boost with 20% revenue increase

item.title: Zero to Hired in 12 Months
item.description: Get hired as a developer in 12 months

item.description: Functional programming concepts in practical code

item.description: Rate limiting strategies for scalable apps

item.title: AI Meets Privacy: Federated Learning
item.description: Federated learning for AI that respects privacy
